steps.title: One real solution → discriminant = 0
steps.content: Rearrange $5x^2 + 18 = 50x + r$ to standard form: $5x^2 - 50x + (18 - r) = 0$. So $a = 5$, $b = -50$, $c = 18 - r$. Exactly one solution means $b^2 - 4ac = 0$.

steps.title: Plug in and solve for r
Answer
steps.content: The required value is $r = -107$, so -107 is correct.
